objective: Generate a proportional 200-root pilot using the final 8-16 variants per root.
pre_requisites: The exact reviewed Stage 1 mock structural gate must pass with zero provider transports, zero training writes, and a replayable immutable report.
A separate live Stage 1 manifest with explicit call, cost, time, privacy, and provider bounds must be approved by Codex at its exact head.
The separately authorized live Stage 1 run must pass its mechanical gates and exact-head Codex review before this Stage 2 pilot is enabled.
blocked_reason: Mock structural success does not authorize provider calls, dataset generation, training, or sealed evaluation.
